blocks.text: E-Commerce Mailer Box Manufacturer in Vietnam – Jinhao Xinyuan Group
Custom die-cut corrugated mailer boxes engineered for brand impact, protection, and export performance.
Premium E-Commerce Mailer Boxes for Global Brands

E-commerce requires packaging that protects products, enhances branding, and creates an exceptional unboxing experience.Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam manufactures custom corrugated mailer boxes, produced with precision die-cutting, offset printing, flexographic printing, and FSC® certified materials.
Designed for strength, sustainability, and fast assembly, our mailer boxes are trusted by global brands in fashion, cosmetics, electronics, lifestyle, subscription boxes, and D2C e-commerce.
Why Our Vietnam Factory Is the Best Choice for E-Commerce Mailer Boxes

Our factory integrates corrugation, offset printing, die-cutting, gluing, and ISTA transportation testing, ensuring every mailer box arrives in perfect condition.We produce both single-wall E-flute mailers and double-wall BE/BC mailer boxes for heavier products and long-distance shipping.
• Premium offset & flexo printing for high-impact branding
Premium offset & flexo printing for high-impact branding
• E-commerce optimized (fast assembly, auto-lock, tear strips)
E-commerce optimized (fast assembly, auto-lock, tear strips)
Types of E-Commerce Mailer Boxes We Produce
Perfect for apparel, cosmetics, small electronics, and subscription boxes.
High-resolution printing with laminated finish for luxury unboxing.
Eco-friendly, natural kraft look with strong B/E flute structures.
Fast assembly mailers ideal for fulfillment centers and fast packing.
Equipped with tear-strip closure & tamper-evident features.
• BE-Flute – hybrid double wall for added strength
BE-Flute – hybrid double wall for added strength
• BC-Flute – maximum protection for heavy items
BC-Flute – maximum protection for heavy items
All boards are FSC-certified and produced in-house for full control over quality.

Jinhao Xinyuan Vietnam delivers printing quality unmatched by standard corrugated manufacturers. By combining offset printing for retail graphics with flexographic printing for transit cartons, we achieve both strength and branding impact.
• Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
Offset printing for litho-laminated corrugated packaging
• UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
UV coating, matte/gloss varnish, anti-scratch surfaces
• Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
Precision flute laminating for smooth printable surfaces
• Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
Custom die-cuts, windows, tear strips & perforations
This makes our factory the ideal partner for brands that need retail-level print quality on corrugated packaging.

We supply export customers who require consistent performance for e-commerce, retail distribution, and industrial shipping.
Sustainable Mailer Boxes for a Greener E-Commerce Supply Chain
• Reduced material usage through structural optimization
Reduced material usage through structural optimization
Vietnam Factory Capabilities for Mailer Box Production
Our facility in Bac Ninh/Bac Giang features:
• Full offset printing up to 6 colors
Full offset printing up to 6 colors
This ensures consistent quality for both small and large-volume mailer box programs.
Request a Quote for Corrugated Packaging Boxes
Our packaging specialists are ready to support your project — from sampling to mass production.We respond quickly with pricing, lead times, and structural recommendations.
